title: All the Pieces
description: Combining NeoForge and Fabric into one amazing modpack.
body:
Typical Kitchensink modpack.

This modpack currently adds over **200** NeoForge mods and **15** Fabric mods through **Sinytra Connector**.
Currently the modpack serves as a base kitchensink and can be played appropriately.


<details>
<summary>Custom Datapack</summary>

- Removes almoost every diamond tier drop from all loot tables.
- Removes Echo Shards from Ancient City chests and adds them as a chance for Warden death drops.

</details>

This project is a work in progress and will evolved into something bigger and move out of being "just a kitchensink modpack".

I would recommend at least **4GB** of ram.

<details>
<summary>Fabric Mods</summary>

- AudioPlayer
- BackSlot & Addon
- Big Brain
- Bookshelf Inspector
- Bundle Pins
- Connectible Chains
- Husk Homes
- Leaves Us in Peace
- Rules4Worlds
- Screenshot Viewer
- Simple Hats
- Trial Spawner Timer
- Trial Vault Restock
- Trinket Comapt
- Voice Chat Integration

</details>


<details>
<summary>External Mods</summary>

- [Advanced Chimneys](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/advanced-chimneys)
